meaning: 格拉摩根郡[英国威尔士原郡名]
examples: Born in 1635 in Llanrhymney, Glamorgan, Wales
Main conference venue is the Glamorgan Building.
With over 200 courses, an outstanding graduate employment rate, teaching excellence awards and low-cost living, whatever you want from your university experience, you'll find it at Glamorgan.
Both Glamorgan and Newport universities welcomed Mr Andrews' decision to allow their merger to progress.
Cardiff Metropolitan University is fighting plans to merge it with Glamorgan and Newport universities.
